daily_summary.headline: Exciting SpaceX Launches and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Block 5 Launches Starlink Group 10-48
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 is set to launch the Starlink Group 10-48, adding to the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity on March 14
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is predicted, offering potential aurora sightings at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check visibility conditions if you're at high latitudes.

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Block 5 Launches Starlink Group 17-31
top_events.description: Another batch of Starlink satellites will be launched by SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5.
top_events.action: Tune in for the live broadcast.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
